creatures.name: Mist Creature
creatures.purpose: Senses the environment and creates heavy mist. Navigating urban clouds in negotiation with the citizens.
creatures.form: A geometric dynamic form in the middle with a scale that can host one human inside. A curved roof with a visible structure covers the core. On both sides there are two curved wings that create water mist clouds. The whole structure is made from metal, the joints are visible, but the construction is neat.
creatures.style: Urban photography. Parisian square. Detailed photorealistic urban installation in bright daylight. A complex, metal apparatus generating mist. A sharp, functional-surrealist aesthetic.

days.mutationSummary: Genesis. First form emerged. Evolution Day 1.
Evolution Day 2.

days.prompt: Expansion of the lateral wings via articulated stainless steel scaffolding to support an increased density of ultrasonic atomizers. The central metal core integrates a matrix of high-pressure nozzles, releasing thick volumetric plumes of white vapor that obscure the structural base. Perforated aluminum panels across the curved roof facilitate the upward draft of artificial clouds. Visible pneumatic lines and polished chrome fittings connect to internal water reservoirs. The atmosphere is saturated with dense mist, diffusing the surrounding urban light into a high-contrast glare against the metallic surfaces.

Curved digital display arrays are embedded behind the transparent facade, emitting synchronized light patterns. Jagged steel plates are bolted as reinforcement over the adjacent stone. At the ground level, the base expands into a heavy-duty communal bench integrated into the sidewalk pavement.
